nasb.text: Again Pharaoh said, “Look, the people of the land are now many, and you would have them cease from their labors!”

esv.text: And Pharaoh said, “Behold, the people of the land are now many, and you make them rest from their burdens!”

cnv.text: 法老又說：“你看，現在這地的民很多，你們竟叫他們歇下擔子？”

ccb.text: 法老又说：“这地方的以色列人如此众多，你竟叫他们停止工作！”
